meta.philosophy: Layered architecture. Security is a first-class citizen. Every payment and auth operation must be isolated and protected.
meta.stack: Node.js, Express, Mobile Money APIs (MTN, Vodafone, AirtelTigo), USSD, GPS

guardrails.name: Payment API Isolation
guardrails.description: Each mobile money provider (MTN, Vodafone, AirtelTigo) must have its own isolated service. Never call multiple payment APIs from the same function.

guardrails.name: Layered Architecture
guardrails.description: No direct database calls from UI components or route handlers. All DB logic must go through a service layer.

guardrails.name: Security First
guardrails.description: All ride booking and payment routes must use auth middleware. No route should be accessible without authentication. No API keys or secrets in code.

guardrails.name: USSD and App Layer Separation
guardrails.description: USSD and mobile app interfaces must never share direct database calls. Both must go through the same service layer.

guardrails.name: Graceful Error Handling
guardrails.description: Never expose raw error messages or stack traces to the client. All errors must be caught and returned as sanitized responses.
